cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which gift after all these swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me note down the initial assignments first. Initial gifts: - Alice: green - Bob: white - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow Now, there are several swaps. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Bob and Alice swap. So Alice gives her green to Bob, and Bob gives his white to Alice. After this swap: - Alice: white - Bob: green - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow Second swap: Alice and Eve swap. Alice has white, Eve has yellow. So after swapping: - Alice: yellow - Eve: white - Bob: green - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball Third swap: Claire and Eve swap. Claire has black ball, Eve has
